headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Product names

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-lg hover:shadow-glow
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors
buttons.floating_whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-xl hover:scale-110 transition-all animate-bounce-subtle

cards.menu_item: bg-surface rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors group relative
cards.feature: bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-sm p-6 rounded-xl border border-white/5 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform

inputs.default: bg-muted border-transparent focus:border-primary rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none transition-all

layout_strategies.hero: Full viewport height (min-h-[90vh]), centered content with parallax background image. Heavy gradient overlay at bottom to blend with content.
layout_strategies.menu_grid: Responsive masonry or bento grid. Mobile: 1 col, Tablet: 2 cols, Desktop: 3-4 cols. Sticky category navigation bar on mobile.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' if not present for icons.
Use 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts for all Headings (h1-h6). Import in index.css.
Use 'Manrope' from Google Fonts for body text. Import in index.css.
Implement a 'WhatsAppOrderButton' component that constructs the URL dynamically based on cart items.

The 'Order on WhatsApp' message format MUST be: 'Hello DK Pizza Cafe, I want to order: 
- [Item] x[Qty]
- [Item] x[Qty]
 Total: ₹[Amount] 
 Address: [User Input]'
Admin Dashboard MUST use Shadcn UI components but styled with the dark theme colors (Red/Black).
Ensure the menu page is filterable by category.
Use localStorage for a simple cart system if no backend cart is available yet.
The footer must include the Google Maps iframe for the address provided.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are added to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items).
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for dark colors.
Do NOT center align the app container.
Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics; use distinct warm/dark contrasts.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover/focus states.
Use 2-3x more spacing (padding/margin) than standard for an elegant feel.
